features: SOFT & GENTLE CLEANSING - Baby Dove Rich Moisture Wipes offer a tender cleaning solution for your baby's delicate skin. Formulated without harsh additives, artificial colourants, or alcohol, these hypoallergenic wipes provide a nurturing touch ideal for daily hygiene and changes, leaving the skin moisturised and soft.

SUITABLE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN - Tailored for the most delicate skin, these wipes are a comforting choice for daily hygiene. Baby Dove Wipes' gentle and safety-tested formula is dermatologically and paediatrician tested, ensuring our mild and caring ingredients make them suitable even for newborns. They provide reassuring cleanliness and care without causing dryness or irritation.

CONVENIENT PACKAGING - Convenience meets care with the easy-to-pull design of Baby Dove Wipes. The resealable pack ensures the wipes stay moist, making them a reliable, fresh solution for spontaneous clean-ups and diaper changes, at home or on the move.

VERSATILE WIPES FOR ALL-OVER USE - Not just for nappy changes, Baby Dove Wipes can be used for cleaning the face and hands too. Soft and durable, they are a must-have in your nappy bag for any messy situation.

ESSENTIAL PACK INFO - This multipack, containing 6 packs of 50 wipes each, is an essential addition to your baby care routine. The practical size of the wipes and the volume of the pack ensure you have a dependable, caring cleaning option for your baby, wherever you are.
description: Looking for gentle baby wipes that will keep your baby’s skin clean and cared for? Baby Dove Rich Moisture Wipes remove impurities and instantly moisturise delicate baby skin without irritating it. Formulated with no artificial colourants or alcohol, these wet wipes contain a combination of caring ingredients that are needed to effectively care for baby skin. Thanks to Baby Dove Rich Moisture Wipes, which are delicately scented and easy to pull out on the go, you can keep your baby’s skin clean and moisturised at all times. These cleansing wipes are dermatologist and paediatrician tested – as gentle as water, they are suitable for all-over use even on newborns’ sensitive skin. Need to be ready for a sudden nappy change? No worries, just pop these Baby Dove wet wipes into the bottom of your buggy or your baby bag to make nappy changes and daily clean-ups quick and easy. With a resealable pack that stays fresh once opened, these baby wipes for newborns won’t leave you stranded when you need them most. Baby Dove support maternal mental health by partnering with Postpartum Support International. Together, Baby Dove and PSI are making maternal mental health support services more accessible. Baby Dove have donated to fund online support groups, helplines and text services for new and expectant moms with the aim of alleviating the extra stress and isolation many now face before and after giving birth.
